data.title: UK Fintech Legado Nears 500,000 Users as Financial Services Sector Rushes to Adopt More Digital Infrastructure
data.description: In Edinburgh, Scotland, the UK fintech company Legado has experienced significant growth in its customer base, with a triple-digit increase over the past year, bringing the total to nearly half a million users. This growth comes as the financial services industry increasingly adopts digital infrastructure. Legado provides support to financial institutions by assisting in the modernization of customer communications and document management through its technology platform. Some of Legado's clients include FNZ, Quilter, Scottish Building Society, Moneyhub, and Co-op Legal Services.

data.title: ESAB Corporation Announces Offering of Senior Notes
data.description: ESAB Corporation, based in North Bethesda, Maryland, has recently disclosed the offering of senior notes. The company, known for its expertise in providing welding and cutting solutions, has yet to announce the specific amount or terms of the offering. This move will allow ESAB to raise funds for various corporate activities, potentially including expansion, research and development, or debt repayment. The offering of senior notes signifies a strategic financial decision by ESAB to leverage external financing for their operations.

data.title: Zebra Technologies’ PartnerConnect Program Earns Top Rating in 2026 CRN® Partner Program Guide
data.description: Zebra Technologies Corporation, a leading company in digitizing and automating workflows, has received a notable achievement in 2026. The company, listed on NASDAQ as ZBRA, was honored with a 5-star rating in the Partner Program Guide by CRN®, under The Channel Company. This recognition is significant for Zebra as it showcases excellence in its partnership program. CRN's guide is a valuable resource for various service providers, aiding them in selecting suitable strategies for their operations. Zebra's acknowledgment in this guide highlights its commitment to providing top-tier solutions and services.
FOREIGN MINISTER SAYS TURKEY AGAINST PLANS AIMED AT INCITING CIVIL WAR IN IRAN AND TRIGGERING CONFLICTS ALONG ETHNIC AND RELIGIOUS FAULT LINES.
Shell plc submits Form 20-F to SEC for regulatory compliance.

data.title: TXOne Networks Showcases TXOne Complete at S4x26, Advancing the Full OT Security Journey for Channel Partners
data.description: A company specializing in operational technology (OT) security has launched a comprehensive framework in Irving, Texas on March 12, 2026. This framework guides channel partners and clients through various stages, starting from discovery to active protection. TXOne Networks, the provider, is focused on enhancing capabilities to better serve their customers.

data.title: 'Nahda Capital Partners' files for registration of inaugural private equity fund in ADGM
data.description: In an effort to emphasize its commitment to fostering long-lasting partnerships and aiding in the growth of the local economy, a company based in Dubai has selected a name that mirrors its enduring mission. The firm, situated in UAE, disclosed that it aims to play a significant role in advancing the region's real economy by offering support to indigenous entrepreneurs, families, and establishments. With a specific emphasis on assisting local founders and institutions, the company named Nahda is determined to contribute positively to the community. The announcement was made on March 12, 2026.

data.title: S&P Global Ratings Forecasts Global Sustainable Bond Market Will Consolidate In 2026 with Issuance Levels at $800-900 billion
data.description: The issuance of global sustainable bonds is expected to stabilize around $800 billion to $900 billion by 2026, indicating a transition from rapid expansion to market stabilization. Regional patterns vary, with Europe maintaining its position as the primary market while the U.S. experiences a decline in issuance. In contrast, issuance in the Asia-Pacific, Latin America, and the Middle East shows differing trends.

data.title: THORNE BECOMES OFFICIAL PARTNER OF THE MIAMI OPEN PRESENTED BY ITAÚ AS EXCLUSIVE VITAMINS, MINERALS & SUPPLEMENTS PARTNER ELEVATING PERFORMANCE AT ONE OF TENNIS' PREMIER GLOBAL STAGES
data.description: In Summerville, South Carolina on March 12, 2026, Thorne, a top provider of evidence-based health and wellness products, revealed a fresh long-term agreement with the Miami Open, establishing themselves as the exclusive partner for Vitamins, Minerals, and Supplements for the tournament. This collaboration underscores Thorne's commitment to supporting overall well-being through science-backed solutions.

data.title: AI Infrastructure Expansion Drives Data Center IT Component Market Growth, According to Dell'Oro Group
data.description: Expansion in 2026 is anticipated to be fueled by Blackwell Ramp, Custom Accelerators, and high demand for components. A report from Dell'Oro Group, a reliable market information provider in telecommunications and security, revealed these drivers. The report was published on March 12, 2026 from Redwood City, California.

data.title: Telexistence Selected as First Japanese Fellow for the Physical AI Fellowship Powered by AWS, NVIDIA, and MassRobotics
data.description: A company from Tokyo known as Telexistence has been chosen as the inaugural Japanese member of the Physical AI Fellowship, a program established by AWS, NVIDIA, and MassRobotics.

data.title: The Marzetti Company Launches Simply Dressed Line Featuring Homemade Flavor and Real, Simple Ingredients
data.description: The Marzetti Company revealed the launch of Marzetti® Simply Dressed salad dressings. Listed on Nasdaq as MZTI, the new line features six flavors: Homestyle Ranch, Creamy Caesar, Balsamic Vinaigrette, Lemon Vinaigrette, Strawberry Poppyseed, and Avocado Green Goddess. These dressings are created with a focus on simple, purposeful ingredients to meet the rising consumer demand for real and recognizable food options. This move reflects a shift towards a 'back to basics' mentality among consumers.

data.title: Superloop Selects Aria Systems to Modernize Billing and Support Multi-Market Growth
data.description: In San Francisco, Aria Systems, a top provider of AI-driven billing automation, disclosed today that Superloop, a leading challenger in Australia's telecommunications sector, has chosen to implement Aria Billing Cloud. This move is aimed at revamping their billing and rating functions encompassing consumer, white-label, business, and wholesale services. Superloop, established in 2014, has experienced significant growth in mobile, broadband, and on-net services. Notably, the company achieved a noteworthy 31% annual revenue increase in 2025. Their adoption of Aria Billing Cloud showcases their commitment to enhancing operational efficiency.

data.title: flyExclusive Expands Pre-owned Citation XLS+ Fractional Ownership Program
data.description: In Kinston, North Carolina, flyExclusive, a vertically integrated private aviation company, has unveiled the relaunch of its Citation XLS+ fractional ownership initiative. This move establishes flyExclusive as the exclusive provider in the industry offering fractional ownership on the XLS+ platform. Interested individuals can purchase fractional shares starting at $695,000, with prices varying based on the size of the share. The company plans to introduce more XLS+ aircraft into the program by 2026 to cater to growing demand.

data.title: Unit21 Recognized as Leader in Chartis FCC50 and Wins Innovation Award for GenAI Summarization
data.description: In San Francisco, Unit21, a prominent AI Risk Infrastructure company specializing in fraud prevention and AML monitoring, was recently recognized in the Chartis Financial Crime and Compliance 50 (FCC50) for 2026. This prestigious ranking identifies Unit21 as a top-tier provider among global financial crime vendors. Unit21's accomplishment includes receiving the Innovation Award for GenAI Summarization, acknowledging its groundbreaking use of agentic AI for streamlining intricate detection and investigation processes.

data.title: Carna Health Marks World Kidney Day with Scaling of CKD Screening Program to Four Continents
data.description: In Boston, Carna Health, a digital health firm focusing on kidney care and cardio-kidney metabolic conditions, revealed the growth of its worldwide chronic kidney disease screening efforts on World Kidney Day. By utilizing AI for early detection and monitoring, Carna Health is broadening its initiatives in various areas to detect CKD before it progresses and link patients with prompt treatment. This move comes as part of Carna Health's commitment to enhancing kidney health globally.

data.title: Momnt Names Allyson Torsak as Chief Revenue Officer
data.description: In Atlanta, Momnt, a prominent fintech firm focusing on real-time lending and payment solutions, has named Allyson Torsak as the Chief Revenue Officer (CRO). Torsak, with a background in senior leadership roles at major fintech companies, will leverage her experience in expanding revenue operations and establishing top-tier sales teams in her new position. Having had a successful career in the financial technology industry, Torsak's appointment reflects Momnt's strategic move to bolster its leadership team.

data.title: Wellesley Hills Financial Goes Global: New London and New York Hubs Signal Aggressive Expansion into Transatlantic Fintech M&A
data.description: Boston-based financial services company, Wellesley Hills Financial, is increasing its global presence in the fintech sector by adding experienced senior leadership in key locations such as London and New York. This expansion aims to further strengthen the company's advisory services and expertise in the fintech industry worldwide.
